scripts.build: vite build && cp public/*.html dist/ && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/_routes.json', JSON.stringify({version:1,include:['/','/_worker.js','/api/*'],exclude:[]}))"
scripts.deploy: npm run build:prod && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:prod && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name webapp
